# AVCaptionConversionTimeRangeAdjustment

**Class**

An object that describes an adjustment to the time range of one or more captions.

## Declaration

```swift
class AVCaptionConversionTimeRangeAdjustment
```

## Accessing time offsets

- **startTimeOffset**: The time value by which the system offsets the start times of captions to correct a problem.
- **durationOffset**: The time value by which the system offsets the durations of captions to correct a problem.

## Accessing the adjustment type

- **adjustmentType**: The type of caption conversion adjustment.
- **AVCaptionConversionAdjustment.AdjustmentType**: Constants that indicate an adjustment type.

## Inherits From

- AVCaptionConversionAdjustment

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
